---
title: "Data"
description: "Public datasets built from primary sources: a Malaysian constituency-level election panel (1959–2018), candidate career panels for UMNO, the LDP, and the KMT, and geocoded settlement layers for Peninsular Malaysia."
---

When the quantity of interest is unobserved, I build the data. Every paper ships with a
journal-grade replication archive; the datasets below are released, or built for release, as
standalone public resources.

**Malaysia Election Panel Data, 1959–2018.**
A constituency-level panel covering every Malaysian general election, built from primary electoral
records with boundary harmonization across successive redistricting exercises.
[Available at Zenodo](https://zenodo.org/records/15937582).

**Lower Chamber Elections Archive, Malaysia.**
Contributed to the
[Constituency-Level Elections Archive (CLEA)](https://electiondataarchive.org/data-and-documentation/clea-lower-chamber-elections-archive/),
including candidate-, district-, and party-coding corrections fed back to the archive.

**Three-Country Candidate Career Panels.**
Career-trajectory panels for every dominant-party candidate in three regimes: the United Malays
National Organisation (UMNO) in Malaysia (1959–2022), the Liberal Democratic Party (LDP) in Japan
(1947–2014), and the Kuomintang (KMT) in Taiwan (1986–2024), assembled from primary records in
three languages with documented codebooks. Public release planned alongside the associated paper,
"Crisis from Within."

**Geocoded Settlement Layers for Peninsular Malaysia.**
Geocoded layers of Emergency-era Chinese New Villages and Federal Land Development Authority
(FELDA) schemes, joined to historical constituency boundaries for every delineation since 1955,
with census-interpolated ethnic composition. Released through the replication archives of the
associated papers.

```{=html}
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@graph": [
    {
      "@type": "Dataset",
      "name": "Malaysia Election Panel Data, 1959–2018",
      "description": "A constituency-level panel covering every Malaysian general election, built from primary electoral records with boundary harmonization across successive redistricting exercises.",
      "creator": { "@id": "https://tylerrongxuanchen.github.io/#person" },
      "temporalCoverage": "1959/2018",
      "spatialCoverage": "Malaysia",
      "url": "https://zenodo.org/records/15937582",
      "sameAs": "https://zenodo.org/records/15937582",
      "includedInDataCatalog": { "@type": "DataCatalog", "name": "Zenodo" }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Dataset",
      "name": "Lower Chamber Elections Archive, Malaysia",
      "description": "Candidate-, district-, and party-coding corrections for Malaysia contributed to the Constituency-Level Elections Archive (CLEA).",
      "contributor": { "@id": "https://tylerrongxuanchen.github.io/#person" },
      "spatialCoverage": "Malaysia",
      "url": "https://electiondataarchive.org/data-and-documentation/clea-lower-chamber-elections-archive/",
      "includedInDataCatalog": { "@type": "DataCatalog", "name": "Constituency-Level Elections Archive (CLEA)" }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Dataset",
      "name": "Three-Country Candidate Career Panels",
      "description": "Career-trajectory panels for every dominant-party candidate in three regimes: UMNO in Malaysia (1959–2022), the LDP in Japan (1947–2014), and the KMT in Taiwan (1986–2024), assembled from primary records in three languages with documented codebooks.",
      "creator": { "@id": "https://tylerrongxuanchen.github.io/#person" },
      "spatialCoverage": ["Malaysia", "Japan", "Taiwan"],
      "creativeWorkStatus": "In preparation; public release planned alongside the paper \"Crisis from Within\""
    },
    {
      "@type": "Dataset",
      "name": "Geocoded Settlement Layers for Peninsular Malaysia",
      "description": "Geocoded layers of Emergency-era Chinese New Villages and Federal Land Development Authority (FELDA) schemes, joined to historical constituency boundaries for every delineation since 1955, with census-interpolated ethnic composition.",
      "creator": { "@id": "https://tylerrongxuanchen.github.io/#person" },
      "spatialCoverage": "Peninsular Malaysia"
    }
  ]
}
</script>
```
